strategy: Low-health tourney boss (1,090). A couple of blades and one hit end it.
She is Life, resists Life 40% and takes +10% from Death. Hit with Death or any non-Life school.
Her only trick is casting Guidance for accuracy when her partner Claudas blades. It does not threaten you, so ignore it and keep hitting.
cheatNotes: Whenever her ally Claudas blades, she gives Guidance for accuracy. It is harmless to you, so there is no need to play around it.
